commit.message:
Add server-side dimension filter to fix promo covers in existing CBZs

getPageList() now reads image widths from file headers (PNG/JPEG/WebP/GIF)
and filters out images whose width differs >30% from the median. This
removes promotional cover images from other series that got scraped
alongside chapter pages — fixes existing CBZ files without re-downloading.

The filter is cached in pageListCache so it only runs once per CBZ file
per server lifetime. Uses zero external dependencies (reads raw image
header bytes for dimensions).

commit.message:
Upload speed, progress & retry optimization

- Sub-chunk progress reporting every 250ms (was only after each 50MB chunk)
- EMA-smoothed speed display to prevent jumpy numbers
- Elapsed timer, "Starting..." text, shimmer animation on active bars
- HTTP agent reuse on all requests (was only chunk uploads)
- Async debounced upload logging (no longer blocks event loop)
- Retry count increased to 5 with extended backoff + jitter
- Clear stale TUS URLs on 404/410, early-exit on file system errors
- Request-level timeouts (30s for HEAD/POST, dynamic for chunks)
- Retry no longer resets progress (preserves TUS resume position)
- Network offline/online auto-pause/resume + system sleep handling
- Stall detection with heartbeat IPC every 5s
- Auto-hide completed files after 5s, bigger start batch button
- Tuned HTTP agent (16 sockets, FIFO scheduling)
